info.title: Universal Public Information Research Assistant
info.description: Universal public information research assistant. It searches permitted public sources, filters spam and duplicates, ranks relevant results, and returns clean JSON. It does not recommend products, suppliers, purchases, or sales strategies unless explicitly asked.

get.description: Public health check endpoint. Does not require an API key.
Public privacy policy page. Does not require an API key.
Public endpoint showing which sources are configured and available.
Public endpoint listing report dates and recent report files.
Public endpoint listing Markdown, HTML, and JSON reports for one date.
Public report download endpoint for files under reports/YYYY-MM-DD/.
Public HTML dashboard showing service status, source status, monitor summaries, recent reports, and documentation links.
Public HTML page for browsing local report history.
Public HTML page listing saved monitor definitions without exposing API keys.
Public HTML page showing service and source status.
Public manifest describing MCP-compatible wrapper endpoints.

post.description: Creates a saved monitor definition under data/monitors/. Requires the X-API-Key header.

get.description: Lists saved monitor definitions. Requires the X-API-Key header.
Returns one saved monitor definition. Requires the X-API-Key header.

delete.description: Deletes one saved monitor definition. Requires the X-API-Key header.

post.description: Runs one monitor by ID or all due enabled monitors. Requires the X-API-Key header.

get.description: Returns monitor status, recent reports, and warnings. Requires the X-API-Key header.

post.description: Creates deterministic multi-step public information research plans from a broad goal. Requires the X-API-Key header.
Plans, searches, deduplicates, analyzes, and returns a deterministic research briefing. Requires the X-API-Key header.
Creates one or more monitor definitions for a long-term research goal. Requires the X-API-Key header.
Compares current public information signals against prior saved reports when available. Requires the X-API-Key header.
Runs a deterministic public information research briefing for a goal and topics. Requires the X-API-Key header.
Searches selected public sources, removes duplicate/spam/advertising results, ranks by relevance, summarizes each result, and returns clean JSON. Requires the `X-API-Key` header.

value.query: Find recent public discussions about AI search tools
Find recent YouTube videos about automatic pet feeders

post.description: Runs the public information search pipeline and returns a deterministic structured analysis report.
Runs public information search and deterministic analysis, then returns a Markdown report.
Generates and exports a research report as Markdown, HTML, JSON, or PDF placeholder. Requires the X-API-Key header.
MCP-compatible wrapper around /search. Requires the X-API-Key header.
MCP-compatible wrapper around /analyze. Requires the X-API-Key header.
MCP-compatible wrapper around /agent/briefing. Requires the X-API-Key header.
Generates a daily public information monitoring report and stores JSON and Markdown files. Requires the X-API-Key header.
Generates a weekly public information monitoring report and stores JSON and Markdown files. Requires the X-API-Key header.
Compares stored JSON reports by date and returns topic, risk, and opportunity differences. Requires the X-API-Key header.
Returns placeholder status for email, Telegram, Discord, or webhook notification channels. Requires the X-API-Key header.
Runs multiple public information research tasks and returns concise deterministic analysis summaries.

query.title: Query
query.description: Natural language public information search request. Provide either query or queries.
examples: Find recent Reddit discussions and Google News articles about AI search tools.

queries.title: Queries
queries.description: Batch search queries. If provided, every query is searched and results are merged.

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Sources to search. Defaults to Google News and general web search.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

export_csv.title: Export Csv
export_csv.description: When true, also write a CSV report under reports/.

export_markdown.title: Export Markdown
export_markdown.description: When true, also write a Markdown report under reports/.

output_language.title: Output Language
output_language.description: auto, English, Chinese, or a language code.

use_ai.title: Use Ai
use_ai.description: When true, optionally enhance deterministic analysis with a configured AI provider.

ai_provider.title: Ai Provider
ai_provider.description: AI provider preference: auto, gemini, openai, or none.

id.title: Id
id.description: Optional monitor ID. If omitted, all enabled due monitors are run.

force.title: Force
force.description: When true, run selected monitor even if it is not due.

examples: Find recent Reddit discussions and Google News articles about AI search tools.

include_analysis.title: Include Analysis
include_analysis.description: Include a lightweight deterministic analysis summary.

author.title: Author
author.description: Public author, channel, source, or publisher when available.

date.title: Date
date.description: Published date or indexed date when available.

full_text.title: Full Text
full_text.description: Full public text when available from the source.

image_url.title: Image Url
image_url.description: Image or thumbnail URL when available.

reason_selected.title: Reason Selected
reason_selected.description: Why the result was selected for the query.

score.title: Score
score.description: Internal relevance and recency score used for ranking.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Simple tags inferred from source and query terms.
